raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX ) on my Best Buy Credit Card on XXXX. The TV failed within 5 weeks of taking delivery ( main power board failure ). When I attempted to return it, trying to initiate a pick-up for the large item ( which must be done manually by Best Buy after a phone call or chat ), Best Buy refused, citing a 15-day policy. 

However, my Best Buy account clearly showed the item was returnable until XX/XX/year>. I have attached screenshots of this return window. I also have chat transcripts where Best Buy agents acknowledged the mismatch between what I was shown ( XX/XX/XXXX ) and what they claimed ( 15 days ), but they still denied the return. 

Citi/Best Buy Credit Services denied my dispute without addressing this evidence, simply repeating the 15-day policy. That denial ignores : The merchants own system showed a later return deadline ( XX/XX/scrub>XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
